# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

type UserRecord = Record<string, unknown> & {
  id?: string;
  userId?: string;
  name?: string;
  email?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
};

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), { ...init, headers });
}

function badRequest(message: string, details?: unknown): Response {
  return json({ error: message, details }, { status: 400 });
}

function notFound(message = "Not found"): Response {
  return json({ error: message }, { status: 404 });
}

function methodNotAllowed(): Response {
  return json({ error: "Method not allowed" }, { status: 405 });
}

function parseBody(req: Request): Promise<unknown> {
  const contentType = req.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
  if (contentType.includes("application/json")) return req.json();
  return req.text().then((t) => (t ? t : null));
}

function normalizeSegment(value: string | null): string | null {
  if (value == null) return null;
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  return trimmed.length ? trimmed : null;
}

function userKey(userId: string) {
  return ["users", userId];
}

function userFilterKey(userId: string, filterParam: string, filterValue: string) {
  return ["users", userId, filterParam, filterValue];
}

async function createUser(user: UserRecord): Promise<Response> {
  const userId = normalizeSegment(String(user.userId ?? user.id ?? ""));
  if (!userId) return badRequest("Missing userId");

  const record: UserRecord = {
    ...user,
    id: userId,
    userId,
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    createdAt: user.createdAt ?? new Date().toISOString(),
  };

  await kv.atomic()
    .set(userKey(userId), record)
    .commit();

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(record)) {
    if (typeof value !== "string") continue;
    if (key === "id" || key === "userId" || key === "createdAt" || key === "updatedAt") continue;
    await kv.atomic().set(userFilterKey(userId, key, value), userId).commit();
  }

  return json({ ok: true, user: record }, { status: 201 });
}

async function getUser(userId: string): Promise<Response> {
  const entry = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey(userId));
  if (!entry.value) return notFound("User not found");
  return json({ user: entry.value });
}

async function searchUsers(url: URL): Promise<Response> {
  const userId = normalizeSegment(url.searchParams.get("userId"));
  if (!userId) return badRequest("Missing userId");

  const filters: [string, string][] = [];
  for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
    if (key === "userId" || key === "limit" || key === "cursor") continue;
    const k = normalizeSegment(key);
    const v = normalizeSegment(value);
    if (k && v) filters.push([k, v]);
  }

  const limit = Math.max(1, Math.min(100, Number(url.searchParams.get("limit") ?? 25) || 25));
  const cursor = url.searchParams.get("cursor") ?? undefined;

  if (filters.length === 0) {
    const prefix = ["users", userId];
    const results: UserRecord[] = [];
    let readCursor = cursor;
    for await (const entry of kv.list<UserRecord>({ prefix }, { limit, cursor: readCursor })) {
      if (entry.value && typeof entry.value === "object" && !Array.isArray(entry.value)) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
    return json({ results, cursor: null });
  }

  const primaryFilter = filters[0];
  const indexKey = userFilterKey(userId, primaryFilter[0], primaryFilter[1]);
  const indexEntry = await kv.get<string>(indexKey);

  if (!indexEntry.value) {
    return json({ results: [], cursor: null });
  }

  const userEntry = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey(indexEntry.value));
  if (!userEntry.value) {
    return json({ results: [], cursor: null });
  }

  const user = userEntry.value;
  for (const [key, value] of filters) {
    if (String((user as Record<string, unknown>)[key] ?? "") !== value) {
      return json({ results: [], cursor: null });
    }
  }

  return json({ results: [user], cursor: null });
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  try {
    if (req.method === "POST" && pathname === "/users") {
      const body = await parseBody(req);
      if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
        return badRequest("Invalid JSON body");
      }
      return await createUser(body as UserRecord);
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname === "/users/search") {
      return await searchUsers(url);
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname.startsWith("/users/")) {
      const userId = normalizeSegment(decodeURIComponent(pathname.slice("/users/".length)));
      if (!userId) return badRequest("Missing userId");
      return await getUser(userId);
    }

    if (pathname === "/health") {
      return json({ ok: true });
    }

    return notFound();
  } catch (error) {
    return json(
      { error: "Internal Server Error", details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) },
      { status: 500 },
    );
  }
});
